reviews.review_msg: Smart and very kind guy, this course is for CPA so get ready for your Tax Journey!

She is the most caring, considerate and friendly professor. Tax concepts already hard and you gotta work hard for it, it maybe long and dry, but she makes it a bit better on her way of delivering it. Extremely care about all of her students, she even offered talk to or found solution in case of any difficulties, best prof <3
